summary.zh: 5 位探索世界奥秘的科学家
summary.en: Five scientists who explored the mysteries of the world

sections.zh: 华罗庚是中国著名的数学家。
sections.en: Hua Luogeng was a famous Chinese mathematician.

sections.zh: 他小时候家里穷，靠自学钻研数学，非常努力。
sections.en: He grew up poor and taught himself math, working very hard.

sections.zh: 他把数学用到工厂和生产中，帮助国家发展。
sections.en: He used math to help factories and the country grow.

sections.zh: 李四光是中国杰出的地质学家。
sections.en: Li Siguang was an outstanding Chinese geologist.

sections.zh: 他研究岩石和大地，想找到祖国地下的宝藏。
sections.en: He studied rocks and the earth to find treasures underground.

sections.zh: 他帮助中国找到了石油，让人们不再担心没有油用。
sections.en: He helped China find oil, so the country no longer worried about running out.

greatFigures.fieldZh: 研究宇宙和黑洞的物理学家

sections.zh: 霍金是英国伟大的物理学家。
sections.en: Stephen Hawking was a great British physicist.

sections.zh: 虽然身体生病不能动，他仍然用大脑思考宇宙的奥秘。
sections.en: Even though illness left him unable to move, he still explored the universe with his mind.

sections.zh: 他研究黑洞和宇宙，写的科普书让很多人爱上了科学。
sections.en: He studied black holes and the universe, and his books made many people love science.

sections.zh: 孟德尔是一位喜欢观察的修道士和科学家。
sections.en: Gregor Mendel was a curious monk and scientist.

sections.zh: 他种了很多豌豆，仔细观察它们一代代的变化。
sections.en: He grew many pea plants and watched carefully how they changed over generations.

sections.zh: 他发现了遗传的规律，告诉我们为什么孩子像父母。
sections.en: He discovered the rules of heredity — why children look like their parents.

sections.zh: 阿基米德是两千多年前古希腊的数学家。
sections.en: Archimedes was a mathematician in ancient Greece, over 2,000 years ago.

sections.zh: 传说他在洗澡时发现了浮力的秘密，高兴得跳了起来。
sections.en: The story says he discovered why things float while taking a bath, and jumped for joy.

sections.zh: 他发现了杠杆和浮力的原理，说：「给我一个支点，我能撬起地球。」
sections.en: He found the rules of levers and floating, saying: give me a place to stand and I can move the Earth.
